concerns.text: T024 (Load aligned_dataset.csv) is marked [X] (complete) but depends on T020 (Generate aligned_dataset.csv) which is marked [ ] (pending). T027 and T028a depend on T024/T025/T026. This creates a consumer-before-producer violation where downstream modeling tasks are marked complete before the data artifact they consume is generated.

T033 (Compute SHAP values) and T034 (Rank descriptors) are marked [X] (complete) but depend on T026 (Save best model to code/models/best_xgboost.json) which is marked [ ] (pending). The tasks consuming the model artifact are marked complete before the producer task is complete.

T014 (Implement exclusion logic for synthesis_condition) is marked [ ] (pending) but T012 (Handle exclusion of Materials Project/2025 CO2) is marked [X] (complete). T014 relies on the data pipeline established in T010-T012. While T014 is pending, the dependency chain is broken because T014 is a prerequisite for T015-T020 (target retrieval, alignment success rate, imputation) which are marked [X] (complete). The preprocessing tasks cannot be complete if the exclusion logic (T014) is not implemented.

T010 (Download stratified sample) is marked [ ] (pending) but T011 (Verify checksums) and T012 (Handle exclusion) are marked [X] (complete). Checksum verification (T011) logically requires the file to be downloaded first (T010). The ordering implies checksums were verified on a file that hasn't been downloaded yet.
